name: Glasshome
descriptionSeed: A city built on the glass plain the Blaze made, by the people the Blaze made. Everything is visible. There are no interior walls in Blazeborn architecture because the idea of a room nobody can see into strikes them as a confession. They are generous, direct, exhausting, and they genuinely do not understand why the rest of the world finds constant total visibility oppressive. Nothing is hidden here. NOTHING is hidden here.
encounterFlavor: Blazeborn who tell you the truth immediately and completely; a visitor slowly unravelling under permanent visibility; someone hiding something, badly, and everyone knows.
questSeeds: Someone in Glasshome has successfully hidden something, and that is the most frightening event in a generation
A refugee from the Harborward has been found, and the city must decide what it is
worldPosNote: Ordinary ground within radiant_wastes, on its bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
